description: High or heightened-risk quality floor with strongest profile and stricter review; upward signal escalation only.
Deterministic signal-based upward escalation with transparent scoring and no learned router.
Auto-failover only on dispatch acknowledgement failure, confirmed process exit, or typed provider error; genuine safety refusals always surface.
Kimi bulk only for low-safety, non-sensitive work with an explicit per-task Chrono bulk flag.
